heading: Dyed fuel
label: 6435 Dyed fuel
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene removed on or after the date that is 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .July 4, 2025section 70525(c) of Pub. L. 119–21section 6206 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene removed on or after the date that is 180 days after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2025 Amendment note under .July 4, 2025section 70525(c) of Pub. L. 119–21section 6206 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: If a person establishes to the satisfaction of the Secretary that such person meets the requirements of subsection (b) with respect to diesel fuel or kerosene, then the Secretary shall pay to such person an amount (without interest) equal to the tax described in subsection (b)(2)(A) with respect to such diesel fuel or kerosene.

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: A person meets the requirements of this subsection with respect to diesel fuel or kerosene if such person removes from a terminal eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene.

children.heading: Eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene defined
children.label: 2 Eligible indelibly dyed diesel fuel or kerosene defined
A
children.text: with respect to which a tax under section 4081 was previously paid (and not credited or refunded), and

children.label: B
children.text: which is exempt from taxation under section 4082(a).

children.heading: Cross reference
children.label: c Cross reference
children.text: For civil penalty for excessive claims under this section, see section 6675.
